summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly states this is not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; already-closed PRs are kept closed; unrelated open PRs remain independent for maintainer or author follow-up.
